title: Video Download Link Crawler Input Schema

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: URLs to start the crawl from.

linkRegex.title: Link Regex
linkRegex.description: Regular expression to filter which links to follow. Only links matching this regex will be crawled. (Default: follow all internal links)

maxRequests.title: Max Requests
maxRequests.description: Maximum number of pages the crawler will request to prevent long/expensive runs.

maxDepth.title: Max Crawl Depth
maxDepth.description: Maximum link depth to follow from the start URLs.

allowedExtensions.title: Allowed File Extensions (Optional)
allowedExtensions.description: List of file extensions to search and extract (e.g. .mp4, .pdf, .mp3, .zip). Leave default for video extraction.
